teaser: An overachiever wakes up married to a stranger in Vegas. She follows the feeling anyway.

title: Last Night at the Telegraph Club
author: Malinda Lo
teaser: A Chinese American girl discovers a club for women who love women in 1950s San Francisco.

title: The Midnight Girls
author: Alicia Jasinska
teaser: Two witches compete to catch a prince in a winter wonderland. They catch each other instead.

title: Pachinko
author: Min Jin Lee
teaser: Four generations of a Korean family navigate war, discrimination and sacrifice. Legacy is heavy.

title: The Help
author: Kathryn Stockett
teaser: Black maids and a young white woman secretly write a book about their lives in 1960s Mississippi.

title: Atonement
author: Ian McEwan
teaser: A child's lie destroys two lives. Decades later she tries to write herself forgiveness.

title: The Hours
author: Michael Cunningham
teaser: Three women across different eras are connected by a single book and the weight of living.

title: Circe
author: Madeline Miller
teaser: The witch of Greek mythology tells her own story. She was never just a villain.

title: Cutting for Stone
author: Abraham Verghese
teaser: Twin brothers born in an Ethiopian mission hospital are separated by fate and reunited by medicine.

title: Behind the Beautiful Forevers
author: Katherine Boo
teaser: Life and death in a Mumbai slum beside the international airport. Astonishing and devastating.

title: The Poisonwood Bible
author: Barbara Kingsolver
teaser: A missionary takes his family to the Congo. The jungle changes all of them.

title: The God of Small Things
author: Arundhati Roy
teaser: Twins in Kerala carry a secret that destroyed their family. The smallest things matter most.

title: White Teeth
author: Zadie Smith
teaser: Two families — one English, one Bangladeshi — navigate identity, faith and history in London.

title: Hamlet
author: William Shakespeare
teaser: A prince seeks revenge for his father's murder. Everyone pays the price.

title: The Great Alone
author: Kristin Hannah
teaser: A family moves to isolated Alaska. The wilderness mirrors a father's unraveling mind.

title: Beloved
author: Toni Morrison
teaser: A formerly enslaved woman is haunted by the ghost of her dead daughter. The past never leaves.

title: Of Human Bondage
author: W. Somerset Maugham
teaser: A young man with a clubfoot pursues art, medicine and a destructive love. Life resists his plans.

title: The Corrections
author: Jonathan Franzen
teaser: An aging couple's three adult children each carry wounds the parents inflicted. Christmas is coming.

title: Requiem for a Dream
author: Hubert Selby Jr.
teaser: Four people chase their dreams through addiction. The fall is unbearable to watch.

title: The Virgin Suicides
author: Jeffrey Eugenides
teaser: Five sisters die one by one. The neighborhood boys spend decades trying to understand why.

title: Death of a Salesman
author: Arthur Miller
teaser: An aging salesman confronts the collapse of his American dream. His sons watch helplessly.

title: Lolita
author: Vladimir Nabokov
teaser: A man justifies the unjustifiable in beautiful prose. The horror is in what he refuses to see.

title: The Way of Kings
author: Brandon Sanderson
teaser: A world of storms and ancient evils. Three people carry the fate of everything on their shoulders.

title: Jonathan Strange and Mr Norrell
author: Susanna Clarke
teaser: Two magicians bring magic back to England. Their rivalry reshapes both history and magic.

title: The Night Circus
author: Erin Morgenstern
teaser: Two young magicians compete inside a mysterious black-and-white circus. The contest will cost one their life.

title: Piranesi
author: Susanna Clarke
teaser: A man lives in a labyrinthine house filled with statues and tides. He is not alone.

title: American Gods
author: Neil Gaiman
teaser: Old gods brought to America by immigrants fight the new gods of technology and media.

title: The Lies of Locke Lamora
author: Scott Lynch
teaser: A gang of thieves con the nobility of a city built on secrets. They push their luck too far.

title: Six of Crows
author: Leigh Bardugo
teaser: Six outcasts plan an impossible heist. The crew is broken. The plan is brilliant.

title: The Blade Itself
author: Joe Abercrombie
teaser: Heroes are not what they seem in a world of brutal politics and war. Everyone has blood on their hands.

title: Uprooted
author: Naomi Novik
teaser: A village girl is taken by a cold wizard to serve him for ten years. She has her own power.

title: The Bear and the Nightingale
author: Katherine Arden
teaser: A wild girl in medieval Russia must save her village from the old spirits her family has forgotten.
